name: rabi-codex-context
description: Inject Rabi PC-managed context and forward plan-bound Codex turn completions through thin lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Use Rabi PC context in one Codex session.
interface.longDescription: Forward Codex session, prompt, tool-loop, and Stop lifecycle events to Rabi PC Manager; inject bounded persona context and let Manager route plan-task completion reminders without duplicating Rabi management logic in the plugin.
interface.defaultPrompt: Bind this Codex session to my Rabi PC persona and report the Manager-owned context.
